name: mostGenerateLightError
title: mostGenerateLightError
syntax: long mostGenerateLightError(long channel, long lightofftime, long lightontime, long repeat)
description: Starts (repeat > 0) or stops (repeat = 0) generation of Light-ON-OFF transitions.
For OptoLyzerOL3150o: The stress network interface controller (NIC) must have active bypass or bypass opened (see mostSetStressNodeParameter).
